metadata.description: Keeps AI delegation a bandwidth multiplier instead of a brain drain: delegation triage, workslop gating, teachback + spaced review with out-of-band delivery (Notes.app, notifications, Slack), skill-atrophy tracking.

plugins.name: bandwidth
plugins.description: Delegation triage (outsource the tedious, keep the craft), workslop gate before publishing, teachback + spaced review so you can still supervise what you delegated
